description: Perform a Pareto Analysis on the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset in Oracle Analytics Desktop to identify the 'vital few' Product Sub-Categories that drive the majority of sales. Create a combo chart titled 'Pareto Analysis of Sub-Categories' that displays 'Product Sub-Category' on the category axis, 'Sales' as the bar measure, and the running total of 'Sales' as the line measure. Ensure the visualization is sorted by sales in descending order. Save the workbook as 'Pareto_Analysis.dva' in the Documents folder.
